SYM_CRP_HEMOLYSE.name: Haptoglobin - High Level
SYM_CRP_HEMOLYSE.description: Lab tests discovered high level of Haptoglobin.

SYM_CRP_ENDOCARDITIS.description: Echocardiography has discovered an infection in endocardium.

SYM_CRP_STK.description: Doppler echocardiography has revealed blockage of brain arteries caused by a clot.

SYM_CRP_TAR.description: Rupture of aorta caused by an injury.

SYM_CRP_THROMBOSIS.description: Ultrasonography has discovered superficial vein trombosis.

SYM_CRP_GALLSTONES.description: Gallstones, also called cholelithiasis, are concretions of cholesterol formed in the gall bladder. Gallstones usually do not cause symptoms, however, if they block the bile duct they can cause a variety of serious conditions.

SYM_CRP_SUPRACLAVICULAR_LYMPH_NODES.description: Enlargement of lymph nodes is recognized as a common sign of infectious, autoimmune, or malignant diseases.

SYM_CRP_AXILLARY_LYMPH_NODES.description: Enlargement of lymph nodes is recognized as a common sign of infectious, autoimmune, or malignant diseases.

SYM_CRP_INGUINAL_LYMPH_NODES.description: Enlargement of lymph nodes is recognized as a common sign of infectious, autoimmune, or malignant diseases.
